headline: Assessing MetLife (MET) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why MetLife (MET) Is On Investors’ Radar Today MetLife (MET) is back in focus after a recent move in its share price, with the stock closing at $78.08 and showing positive returns over the past week, month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for MetLife. The recent 1 day share price return of 1.28%, alongside a 13.89% 1 month share price return, points to building short term momentum. The 5 year total shareholder return of 44.73% highlights a steadier long run outcome. If this kind of...
